hero.sub: DailyMood uses AI to understand your mood from text, voice, and photos — surface patterns and see your whole year on one screen. Free forever.

mockup.question: How are you feeling today?
mockup.aiSummary2: than last week. Days with exercise scored

ai.sub: More than a tracker. DailyMood reads your entries, pulls key phrases, finds patterns — just ask by voice or text.
ai.f1desc: Write naturally. AI extracts mood, tags, and a one-sentence summary — review and confirm before saving.
ai.f2desc: Upload a photo. AI reads context and suggests tags about the moment (Pro).
ai.f3title: A weekly recap that actually lands
ai.f3desc: Summary, patterns, and one tailored suggestion each week — with sparklines and thumbs up/down feedback.
ai.demoNlpText: Got through the big presentation. Tired but relieved. Treated myself to coffee from the usual spot ☕

how.title: Three steps to start
how.s1d: Pick one of 7 default moods or design your own (Pro)
how.s2d: Add a short note, use voice, or attach a photo. AI summarises and tags.
how.s3d: Year-in-pixels calendar and weekly insights — patterns included.

year.title: Your whole year, one screen
year.sub: One dot per day, coloured by your dominant mood. Spot the good stretches, the rough patches, and your rhythm — instantly.

list.d: 7 default moods + custom moods (Pro) · log multiple times per day
Short notes, or speak it — works in TH and EN.
Monthly grid with a swipe-up day sheet — tap any day for entries.
★ best day · ◌ pattern · ◌ anomaly — AI surfaces patterns on the grid (Pro)
Just type the question: "when did I feel anxious this month?" — answers with date chips (Pro)
Summary + patterns + one tailored suggestion + sparkline · share to clipboard or socials.
Trend line, mood-mix donut, and which activities lift your mood.
12 auto-earned badges, streak ring, weekly highlights — never streak shame.
Restyle your 7 moods. Profile gets custom avatar + bio too.

items.q: First mood app that made me actually understand myself. The AI insights cut deep.
Use it every morning, under 30 seconds. Tap a mood, type a quick note, AI summarises it instantly.
Started seeing my own patterns — which days I work well, when I need to rest. I plan my week around it now.
Love that there are no ads and no streak shame. I use it when I want to.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when ready.
pricing.sub: No fake trial — Free is forever. Pro unlocks unlimited AI.

items.a: Everything is encrypted and stored securely. Image links rotate every hour. We never sell or share your data.

items.q: Do you train AI on my entries?
items.a: No. Your entries stay in your account only. We never use them to train AI, and we never share them.
Yes — DailyMood is a web app that works on every browser size. Open instantly without installing; you can also Add to Home Screen for an app-like feel.

items.q: How is it different from other mood trackers?
items.a: DailyMood is designed for under 10 seconds a day but produces deeper insights with AI — auto summaries, calendar pattern detection, ask AI directly, and photo analysis.

items.q: Can I cancel Pro any time?
items.a: Yes — cancel from your Subscription page any time. You keep Pro features until the period ends.
Thai and English for both UI and AI summaries. Switch in settings any time.

meta.title: DailyMood — Track your mood every day with AI · Free Mood Journal
meta.description: DailyMood is a web-based mood journal that uses AI to understand your feelings from text, voice, and photos. Find patterns, see your whole year in pixels, and start free in seconds.

consent.title: We use cookies to make DailyMood better
consent.sub: Some cookies are essential. Others help us understand how people use the site so we can improve it. Your call.
